Enum.value: Piezas pequeñas métricas y CNC (mm, mm/min)
Imperial para ingeniería civil (pies, libras, millas por hora)

Property.name: PortDirections
Property.doc: Port direction vectors (unit vectors pointing outward from each port)

Property.name: Ports
Property.doc: Ports position relative to the origin of Shape
